description: Root command — confirms the mod command system is live.
Reports what SteveAI is currently looking at / can see from its position.
Enables the on-screen debug overlay for SteveAI state.
Disables the on-screen debug overlay. Default on world entry.
Runs the primary SteveAI grouped scan around SteveAI's current position. Scans blocks, entities, and block-entities and emits grouped counts. Default mode=all, radius=2 chunks.

scanArgs.description: Free-form override. Accepted forms: 'all', '<type>', '[type1,type2] <radius>', '<type> <radius>', 'fast', '<type> fast'. Type tokens match SteveAI entity/block group names.

detail.description: Runs a detailed scan at an explicit world position.

detailSAI.description: Runs a detailed scan centered on SteveAI's current position.

description: Scans blocks only in a chunk-radius box centered on explicit coordinates. Optionally force-loads chunks.
Scans entities only in a chunk-radius box centered on explicit coordinates. Optionally force-loads chunks.
Scans block-entities only in a chunk-radius box centered on explicit coordinates. Optionally force-loads chunks.

Stage-2 deep structural scan at explicit coordinates BUT also fast. very useful for scans close to player or steveAI. Runs signature matching (SAI2 rules) across the chunk-radius. Returns likely structure IDs with evidence. Optionally uses a previously cached scan result and/or force-loads chunks.

UseCache.description: Reuse last cached block/entity data instead of rescanning.

description: Runs SAI2 signature matching at a single explicit chunk position and returns the ranked likely structure IDs with evidence items. Lighter than scanSAI2 — no radius loop.
Stage-3 scan at explicit coordinates. Runs a finer-grained SAI3 pass over the chunk-radius.
Stage-4 fastest scan but at the expense of vertical clipping around the Y value.

Broad, lightweight SAI scan at explicit coordinates for Entities and BlockEntities ONLY. Collects coarse evidence hints across a large radius (0 means current chunk only). Used as stage-1 pass in POIfind.
Reports the current scan manager state from the most recent scan (counts, chunk info, timing).
Very fast biome snapshot around the player. Reports the player's current biome, SteveAI's current biome, and the set of nearby biomes touching each current biome.

Very fast sampled biome map around the player. Uses vanilla biome lookups for ground truth, then annotates results with scan-derived POI/structure biome evidence from blocks, entities, block_entities, and vanilla_structures_pois.json. Returns approximate biome bounding boxes and center locations.

chunkRadius.description: Chunk radius around the player to sample.

sampleStep.description: Block spacing between biome samples. Lower is denser and slower; 8 is a good fast default.

description: Very fast sampled biome map centered on explicit coordinates. Same output style as biomeMap, but useful for testing an arbitrary location.

chunkRadius.description: Chunk radius around the explicit center.

description: Uses the vanilla biome-source locate path to find the nearest specific biome to the player. Best for targeted biome lookups like plains, desert, or minecraft:cherry_grove.

biome.description: Specific biome id or short name, e.g. plains or minecraft:plains.

horizontalInterval.description: Horizontal search interval passed to the vanilla biome locator.

verticalInterval.description: Vertical search interval passed to the vanilla biome locator.

description: Full POI discovery pipeline BUT is very fast. Runs a broad scan over chunkRadius, then deep-scans up to scanLimit chunks that have broad evidence hits. Writes a POIfind_*.txt report with ranked structure/ore candidates and merged evidence. Auto-triggered on chat-window open.

chunkRadius.description: Radius in chunks to sweep for broad evidence.

scanLimit.description: Max number of candidate chunks to deep-scan.

UseCache.description: Reuse cached chunk data for deep scan phase.

ForceLoad.description: Force-load chunks during deep scan phase.

status.description: Reports the progress/state of an in-flight POIfind run.

reset.description: Cancels and resets any in-flight POIfind state.

description: Prints the current in-memory POI map — all confirmed POI centers with their types and coordinates.
Focused POI find for a specific POI type. Scans chunks within chunkRadius and reports only matches for the given type.

poi.description: Internal POI type name (e.g. village_candidate, dungeon, trial_chamber, archaeology_site).

description: Stage-1 POI update — walks nearby chunks, collects candidate POI centers from block/entity patterns, and stores them in the candidate queue. Alias: poiUpdate.
Stage-2 POI confirmation — deduplicates candidate centers by chunk, runs scanSAI2 on up to 'limit' unique chunks, and promotes confirmed results into the POI map. Alias: poiConfirmCandidates.

limit.description: Max number of candidate chunks to confirm.

description: Clears the entire POI map (confirmed centers, candidates, counters).
NOT USEFULE to steveAI. For debugging. Reports current server performance — MSPT, tick budget status, and load tier.

stream.description: Shows or toggles the heartbeat log stream for continuous MSPT output.

on|off.description: Turn stream on or off. Omit to check current state.

set.description: Tunes server load thresholds used to classify idle vs. busy vs. behind.

idleMspt.description: MSPT below which the server is idle.

busyMspt.description: MSPT above which the server is busy.

reset.description: Resets server load tuning to factory defaults.

description: Directs SteveAI to navigate toward the nearest known POI of the given type. Searches the in-memory POI map and sets an exploration goal.
Stops any active SteveAI exploration task and clears exploration state.
Reports the current SteveAI exploration goal, POI type, center position, and radius.
Commands SteveAI to follow the executing player, keeping within 3 blocks.
Commands SteveAI to pathfind toward the executing player from its current position.
Stops SteveAI's follow/find-me behaviour and cancels active navigation.
Enables chunk force-loading around SteveAI so its chunks stay loaded EVEN if the player is far away. Default on world entry.
Disables chunk force-loading around SteveAI.
Reports SteveAI's current or last-known block position and chunk coordinates.
Teleports SteveAI to a safe position near the executing player.
Prints a summary of SteveAI's current inventory slots.
Adds a specified item to SteveAI's inventory. Before dropping you may need to add the item to steveAI inventory if it isn't in inventory

itemName.description: Item registry name or display name (e.g. wheat, diamond).

description: Removes a specified item from SteveAI's inventory and drops it in the world. Great for getting blocks or trading with steveAI

itemName.description: Item registry name or display name.

description: Opens the SteveAI inventory GUI for the executing player.
Writes SteveAI scan text summary files (poiSummary, steveAI status, etc.) to the player data folder immediately.

suffix.description: Optional filename suffix to distinguish this snapshot.

description: Writes SteveAI detail text files (detailBlocks, detailEntities, detailBlockEntities) to the player data folder immediately.

suffix.description: Optional filename suffix to distinguish this snapshot.

description: LEGACY not usefule. Forces an immediate flush of all SteveAI scan and POI files to disk.
Sends a natural-language message to the OpenAI backend with the current SteveAI context bundle (POI map, scans, POIfind report) and returns the reply in chat.

message.description: Natural-language question or instruction for the AI agent.

note: This is the catch-all greedy argument at the end of the testmod tree — any text that doesn't match a subcommand literal is routed here as a chat message.
